{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Spear (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Bliss]] carries a Spear.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
